安德伍德拿下俄亥俄 康威将认输
将军竟然说要杀死总统 The general talked about killing the president.
再加上康威在飞机上的爆发 That, along with Conway's outburst on the plane--
这么说好像夸大了实际情况 That sounds worse than it was.
不  实际情况就是这么严重 No, that sounds exactly as bad as it was.
让我觉得惊讶的是 What's surprising to me is...
选举团队竟然应对不过来 the campaign couldn't get their hands around this.
哈里·马歇尔已经很厉害了 I mean, Harry Marshall is as good as they come, but--
他们先是否认  接着又模棱两可 First they denied, and then they equivocated--
这简直太荒唐了 I mean, that's just, like, ridiculous.
你站出来 You just come out,
"我道歉  我们说错话了" "I apologize. We misspoke."
所有人都知道这套路 Everybody knows the drill here.
共和党人也没有冲过去帮他们 And it's not like the Republicans rushed in
力挽狂澜 to save the day either.
-完全不谈正题  -他们默不作声 - Off message throughout. - They got quiet.
这一点我怎么也想不通 Which I will never understand.
威尔·康威可是党内冉冉升起的新星 Will Conway was a rising star in the party.
怎么能跟安德伍德政治机器相匹敌呢 Look, it's hard to compete with the Underwood machine.
天啊  我们别再说这些"阴谋占领"的疯话了 God. Let's not do the whole "black helicopters" crazy stuff.
太荒唐了 It's ridiculous.
我们得接受安德伍德赢得大选这一事实 Look, we need to accept Underwood won the election.
公众得接受这个结果  继续前进 People need to accept the outcome and move on.
我同意范的观点 I'm gonna agree with Van.
我觉得我们应该感激宪法 I think we need to take a moment to appreciate the Constitution.
它会弯折[妥协]It bent,
-但不会折断[毁坏]  -说得没错 - but it never broke. - That's right.
我们都知道  到最后 And in the end, as we all know,
还是由选举人团决定 it came down to the Electoral College.
你不用说那句话  州长 You don't have to say the words, Governor.
我应该说 I think I do.
恭喜  当选总统先生 Congratulations, Mr. President Elect.
这次没有稿子吗 There's no script for this one?
国家第一  先生 Country first, sir.
我很高兴你这么说  威尔 I'm glad to hear you say that, Will.
我想帮这个国家愈合 I want to start to help the country heal again.
说完了吗 Are we done?
说完了  但是威尔 We are done. But Will...
我很想向国家展示 I would very much like to show the country
我们两党可以齐心协作 that our two parties can work together.
我希望你考虑 So I was hoping that you might consider
做我的运输部长 becoming my transportation secretary.
如果你同意加入我的内阁 I think it would send a powerful message
会发出一个强有力的信号 if you agreed to join my cabinet.
你觉得我能 You think I'd...
当好运输部长吗 make a good... transportation secretary?
没错 Yes.
这是开给无名议员的条件 That's what you give the congressman from nowhere.
我会拒绝的 I'll be declining.
听到你这么说真是太遗憾了  威尔 Well, I'm so sorry to hear that, Will.
我想祝你一切顺利 And I wanted to wish you the very best.
去你的  去你的祝福 You and your wishes can go fuck yourselves!
我现在做什么 What do I do now?
所有人都以为威尔会赢 ...everyone thought it would happen.
没人想到安德伍德还能赢 No one thought that Underwood would win again...
我不知道 I don't know.
承认失败从来都不容易 Acknowledging defeat is never easy.
在公众面前承认更是无比煎熬 Doing it in public is a living hell.
起码媒体喜欢他 Well, at least the cameras like him.
我看着满意吗 Do I look satisfied?
你看着还算满意 You look somewhat satisfied.
-好  -"好"可不够 - Good. - Not good.
弗兰西斯  享受这一刻吧 Francis, enjoy this moment.
-这是你应得的  -是"我们"吧 - You deserve it. - You mean "we."
我们成功到达另一边了 We made it to the other side.
是啊 Yes.
但另一边有什么 But what is on the other side?
胜利 Victory.
稍带点失败的气息 With a whiff of defeat.
花了好久才走到这一步 It's taken a long time to get here,
但我们到了 but we're here.
干杯  弗兰西斯 Cheers, Francis.
今后一切都会变得容易 Everything gets easier from now on.
他们准备好了 They're ready for you.
-汉娜  -我不想去 - Hannah. - I don't want to go.
不 No.
好吧 Fine.
那我自己去吧 I'll do it on my own.
要知道  这是个重要时刻 I'm gonna say, this is a crucial moment.
对你们两个都是 For both of you.
看你们如何应对 How you handle tonight.
党抛弃了我 The party abandoned me.
你的党 Your party.
我不是共和党  威尔 I'm not the Republican Party, Will.
我只为候选人效力 I work for candidates.
我为你效力 I worked for you.
听好  你输了 Listen, you lost.
但还有一多半国民 But more than half the country
仍认为你是他们的总统 still considers you their president.
你必须要面对他们 This is what's required.
走出去  发表讲话 Go down there, give your speech.
认输吧 Concede.
国务卿  华盛顿
尊敬的总统先生 我谨辞去第68任国务卿职务
此致 凯瑟琳·杜兰特
我正式接受各位的辞呈 As I accept all of your letters of resignation
并解散我的旧内阁 and dissolve my old cabinet,
然后我想欢迎在座各位加入我的新内阁 I wanna welcome each and every one of you to my new cabinet.
-恭喜你  总统先生  -谢谢  凯茜 - Congratulations, Mr. President. - Thank you, Cathy.
我尤其想感谢我的妻子 And I especially wanna thank my wife.
副总统女士 Madam Vice President...
感谢你对我长期坚定的支持 thank you for your unending and unwavering support.
这一个月来  你的坚强领导维持了国家的运作 Your steady hand kept this country running this past month.
我欠她太多  多到我无法想象 I owe her more than I can possibly fathom.
而她也欠我 And she owes me.
不对  你一直在我身边支持着我 Not true. You were with me all the way.
作为合法当选总统 I would like to make my first 100 days
我希望我的头一百天能取得尽可能多的成绩 as the duly elected president as productive as possible.
当然  挑战还是很多的 Of course, there are many challenges.
提振经济 Shoring up the economy,
保护我国不受哈里发国攻击 securing our nation from ICO
还要降低失业率 and reducing unemployment.
但我们面对的最艰巨的问题 But the biggest challenge that we face,
也是我最需要各位通力协助的挑战 and the one that I'm going to need all of your help on,
就是重新团结全国 is reuniting a country
弥合这个国家前所未有的裂痕 that has never been more divided than it is today.
我相信我们可以迎难而上 I believe we can meet this challenge,
而我需要各位的帮助 and that's where I'm gonna need all of your help.
所以今天我们就开始治愈国家 So let's let the healing begin today
共同创造历史吧 and let's make history together.
感谢你们长久的辛勤奉献 I thank you all for your continued service.
现在回去工作吧 Now let's get back to work.
我需要一分钟 I need a minute.
我想我们应该早做打算 I think we should see what we can do
把厄舍赶走 about making Usher persona non grata.
现在开战不合适吧 I don't think that's wise to start a war.
我们才刚刚拿下白宫 We've just won the White House.
现在才是出手的最佳时机 This is exactly when we should strike.
只有现在我们才有足够的政治资本 This is a moment that we have the political capital...
厄舍必须小心处理 Usher needs to be managed carefully.
总统先生 Mr. President?
喘口气吧  道格 Take a breath, Doug.
我们才刚刚站稳脚跟 We've only just landed on our feet here.
先生  副总统女士 Sir, Madam Vice President,
过去在众议院  这种人就是重点打击对象 this is the type of person that we used to crucify in the House.
但现在我们不在众议院  我们在白宫 Yes, but we're not in the House now. We're here.
我们还有一整个任期呢 We have a full term ahead of us.
我们肯定会取得 There's gonna be a great deal
非常多的成就 that we're gonna be able to accomplish,
咱们三个合作 the three of us.
感谢您的器重  先生 I appreciate that, sir.
但是马克·厄舍早晚会变成麻烦的 But Mark Usher will become a problem.
每个人早晚都会变成麻烦 Well, everyone becomes a problem, eventually.
莉安出局了 LeAnn's out.
什么 What?
为什么 Why?
她搞砸了 She screwed up.
有什么需要我准备的吗 Well, is it something I need to get ready for?

所以我们具体该说什么 So what exactly are we saying?
她被赶走了 She's being pushed out.
好  但是选举结束了 Okay, but the campaign's over.
还有必要对外说什么吗 Is it necessary to say anything?
我们需要撇清本届政府与她 We need to distance this administration
和她工作的关系 from her and her work.
还有她的策略 Her tactics.
得装成是泄露出去的 So it needs to be a leak.
泄露给不喜欢我们的人 Reach out to the people who don't like us.
他们肯定乐意爆料 They'll be prime to go with it.
等我们回应的时候 Okay, so when we respond...
-是公开还是  -公开 - On the record or... - On.
她做了什么 What did she do?
她展现出了很差的判断力 She showed some very poor judgment.
我相信你会谨慎的 I'm trusting you to be discreet.
我们赢了  赛斯 We won, Seth.
需要做出一些改变 Changes need to be made.
你知道我已经远离政治了 You know I'm off politics.
你来找我  我真的很惊讶 Surprised you reached out to me.
你是一位非常受人尊敬的记者 You're a highly-respected journalist.
就是来参加就职典礼和舞会而已 Just here for the inauguration and the parties.
我想你已经听说了  我被赶走了 So I imagine you've heard that I'm on the outs.
他们没有说出全部实情 They're not telling the whole story.
发生了什么 So what happened?
我有个熟人 An acquaintance of mine
从国安局偷了机密文件 stole classified documents from the NSA
去了俄罗斯 and took off to Russia.
他们因为这件事责怪我 They're blaming me for it.
你这个熟人带走的是什么 What did this acquaintance take?
问题就是这个  我也不知道 That's just the thing. I have no idea.
要是你能找到他  跟他谈谈 If you could find him, talk to him,
他会告诉你  我和这事一点关系都没有 he would tell you that I had nothing to do with this.
他是谁  他叫什么 Who is he? What's his name?
艾丹·麦卡伦 Aidan Macallan.
他会跟你谈的  他尊重你 He'll talk to you. He respects you.
告诉他我现在没事 Tell him that I'm okay.
以后也会没事的 That I'm going to be okay.
我坚信派遣地面部队 I'm a firm believer in boots on the ground.
我们就是为了石油去的  别装了 Well, we're there for the oil. Let's not pretend.
我不否认保护原油供应的重要性 I'm not denying how crucial it is to protect the oil supply.
但由我们来盯住 But it's in the world's best interest
对整个世界都好 that we're the ones keeping an eye on it.
-盯住世界还是石油  -都是 - On the world or the oil? - Both.
难怪你对南极那么感兴趣 Well, that explains your strong interest in Antarctica.
我确实关注事情和人 I do focus on things and people.
我常会起怜惜之情 I tend to get attached,
但我觉得这让我的工作更加出色 but I think it makes me better at what I do.
你现在关注什么 And what are you focused on now?
首先是佩特罗夫和艾哈迈德·艾哈迈迪 Petrov. Ahmed Al Ahmadi. To begin with.
抱歉 I'm... I'm sorry.
我只是 I just...
我明天再问你的意见 I'll run this by you tomorrow.
好  明天 Yes, tomorrow.
抱歉打断你们了 Sorry for the interruption.
他是我们的一个演讲撰稿人 He's one of our speechwriters.
汤姆·耶茨很有名 Tom Yates has quite a reputation.
要是他的书能说明什么的话 Well, if his books are any indication,
他的生活可很精彩 he has lived quite a life.
我爸爸也穿条纹袜 My father wore striped socks.
你觉得总统会赞同我们的议程吗 Do you think the president will be sympathetic to our agenda?
"我们的议程"  这么说太自负了 "Our agenda"? That's very presumptuous.
这世界上有些地区 Well, there are regions in the world
对我们的国家安全很重要 that are important to our national security
我们必须保护这些地区 and they have to be protected.
你想跟我们一起参加就职舞会吗 Would you like to join us at the inaugural ball?
不行 Oh, no, I can't.
只要我去舞会  就会发生可怕的事 Something terrible always happens when I go to a party.
顺说  我丈夫不会受任何人的摆布 By the way, my husband is not managed by anyone.
-我不是这个意思  -不是吗 - That's not what I'm asking. - Isn't it?

仅此而已 That is all.
晚上好 Evening.
天啊  进来吧 Oh, my God. Come in.

今晚不锻炼了吗 Aren't we working out tonight?
我应该是没时间了 I just don't think I'm gonna have the time for it.
过来坐一会儿 But come sit for a minute.
要是你太忙的话 If you're too busy,
-我能理解  -不  来跟我坐会儿 - I understand-- - No, no. Join me for a minute.
我想让你听点东西 I want you to hear something.
"这是新时代的黎明 "This is the dawn of a new era.
这是和平的时代 It's a time for peace.
要尊重过去  拥抱未来 A time to respect the past and embrace the future.
要..." A time..."
要什么 Time to what?
"要聆听所有声音 "A time to hear all the voices.
因为世间最大的孤独 For there is nothing more lonely...
恐怖 or terrifying...
便是无人聆听" than feeling unheard."
你觉得怎么样 What do you think?
有意思  我喜欢 It's interesting. I like it.
-这是为了  -我的就职典礼  没错 - This is for... - My inauguration, yes.
然后呢  你接下去怎么说 Where does it go from there? What do you say?

无论你们是否投票给了我 Whether you voted for me or not,
我听到了你们所有人的声音" I hear all of you."
你觉得我的曾曾曾祖父 Now, what do you think my great-great-great-grandfather
会怎么评价这些 would think of all this?
令人敬畏[非常好] Awesome.
-就这词原本的意思  -是啊 - In the original sense of the word. - Yeah.

实际上  今晚就走 Leaving tonight, actually.
我以为你是来参加就职典礼的 I thought you were here for the inauguration.
我收到了一条消息  得走了 I got a tip I have to move on.
什么消息 What's the tip?
咱们以前对工作谈话可是有规矩的 We used to have a rule about shoptalk.
是吗 Did we?
好吧 Fair enough.

你信任她 You trust her?
凯特  拜托 Kate, come on.
你很憔悴 You look tired.
我现在一周工作八天 I'm working eight days a week.
你以前也总是很憔悴的样子 I mean, you always looked tired,
但你现在的憔悴  不那么性感了 but now you look tired in a... not sexy way.
抱歉让你失望了 Sorry to disappoint.
其实我马上就得回去了 I actually have to get back there in a minute.
这会儿回办公室有点晚了吧 It's little late to head back to the office, right?
我从上周二起就一直在那边 I've been there since last Tuesday.
说实话 Honestly...
我知道这话听起来有点怪 I know this sounds weird...
但我没有更想去的地方了 There's no place I'd rather be.
你这话的语气真...生硬 The way you say that sounds so... rote.
我说不好 I don't know...
这让我怎么回应 What am I supposed to say to that?
我只想知道你好不好  仅此而已 I just want to know how you're doing, that's all.
我只是关心你  坐在我眼前的这个人 I'm just asking about you, this person I'm sitting with.

我找你来着 I was looking for you.
看来找得不够用心啊 Not very hard, then.
我得跟你谈谈 I need to talk to you.
好 Okay.
我不干了 I'm done.
我不想再写演讲稿了 With the speechwriting, I don't want to do it anymore.
我想回去做我之前在做的其他事 I want to get back to some other stuff I was working on.
没别的意思  我知道写演讲稿也是写作 No offense. I mean, I know writing speeches is writing...
但这不是我真正想做的 but it's not what I really wanna do.
好 Okay.
你确定 You sure?
是的 Yes.
我们会把你调出去的 We'll transition you out.
但你以后再来就得想好借口了 But you'll need to have a reason to be here.

有猜测说他已经... There's speculation that he's already...

突破党派界限之类的 Uh, reaching across party lines, that sort of thing.

就这样 That's it.
我知道你不高兴 I know you're not happy about this.
他凭什么能赢得那头衔 What has he done to earn the title?
这不是他赢得什么的问题 This is not about him earning anything.
他已经在接触机密备忘录了 He's already getting classified memos.

"她" "She"?

而我想要的是你跟他成为朋友  了解他 And what I want is for you to befriend him. Get to know him.
我们要让他以为是他在操控我们 We want him to think he's managing us
而其实是我们在控制他 while we're busy managing him.
她追查弗兰西斯·安德伍德很久了 She has been pursuing Francis Underwood for a long time.

把事情公开对你和我都没帮助 Yeah, going public will not help you, or me.

美国护照是绝对保护不了你的 An American passport is the last thing that will keep you safe.

但你想要自由 But you do want to be free.

你就不该犯这种错 And you should know better.

因为他从不轻易放手 It's because he's relentless.

因为他就是未来 Because he's the future.
就是这么开始的 This is how it starts.
我得回国会去了 I gotta get back to the Hill.
跟你说  道格 You know, Doug...
你我都待得够久  见过换护卫 you and I, we've been around long enough to see the guard change.
之所以会换人  是因为上头那些人 And it changes because the people at the top
忘了自己是怎么爬上去的 forget how they got there.

美国联邦政府内阁包括副总统在内  目前共24名成员 其中负责国家安全的  如国务卿  国土安全部长  国防部长  被认为最重要 此外司法部长  财务部长也是比较重要的位置 而交通部长  农业部长  教育部长等  被认为是相对次要的职位 但因为现任总统特朗普在竞选时承诺 上任后将进行总值1万亿美元的基础建设投资 所以交通部长在现政府中地位较高 现任交通部长是华裔赵小兰  她丈夫麦康诺是参议院多数党领袖 许多媒体认为  特朗普任命赵小兰负责交通部 除了因她在小布什政府任职时  表现优异之外 也可能是希望在基建政策上获得麦康诺的支持

"医保改革"过去八年来一直是美国政治斗争的核心议题 奥巴马的新医保法案在2010年通过后 就一直遭右翼政客及共和党选民的反对 共和党也借此先后夺回了国会两院的控制权 特朗普竞选时  一再承诺上台后会推翻和替代原有的医保法案 但上任后  实际操作却困难重重  现在的替代法案能否通过尚无定数 同时  现有的医保制度在美国社会遇到了大麻烦 2009年推行法案时  奥巴马称法案通过后  保费会大幅降低 但法案施行后  不仅保费年年暴涨  而且由于医保公司亏损严重 在进入2017年后  美国一些地区的百姓已经无法购买"奥巴马医保" 所以替代方案也是势在必行了
